title: Easy Manhunt
description: An Easy way to do a Minecraft manhunt
body:
🔥 EasyManhunt – A Simple and Powerful Minecraft Manhunt Plugin (1.21)
EasyManhunt is a lightweight, easy-to-use plugin that brings the excitement of the popular "Manhunt" game mode to your Minecraft 1.21 server. Designed for server operators and content creators, it enables players to quickly set up intense PvP survival races between runners and hunters with just a few commands.

💡 Core Features:
🎯 Hunter Tracking Compass
Hunters receive a compass that automatically tracks the nearest runner. It cannot be dropped, moved, or removed—even after death.

🧍‍♂️ Team Management Commands
Use simple commands to add or remove players from the hunter or runner teams:

/hunter add <player> – Add a player as a hunter.

/runner add <player> – Add a player as a runner.

/hunter remove <player> / /runner remove <player> – Remove players from teams.

/manhunt list – View all current hunters and runners.

🏁 One-Command Game Start
Use /manhunt start to:

Reset all players' health, saturation, inventories, and effects.

Set the time to day.

Begin the manhunt.

💀 Victory Detection

If all runners die: a title displays "Hunters Win!"

If runners defeat the Ender Dragon: a title displays "Runners Win!"

♻️ Automatic Hunter Respawn Support
Hunters respawn with a new tracking compass—no setup required.
